title: OPF Color Scheme
description:
Schema for color-scheme records in the pptx.gallery library. Each scheme is a named palette with the twelve PowerPoint color slots (six accents, two darks, two lights, plus hyperlink and followed-hyperlink), suitable for being mapped directly into OOXML theme XML. Color schemes are referenced from OPF documents via design.colorScheme or design.colorScheme.id; the engine resolves the reference against catalogs.colorSchemes (inline) -> catalogs.colorSchemes.source -> the default catalog at https://www.pptx.gallery/color-schemes. Slot overrides on design.colorScheme take precedence over the resolved scheme.

The slot fields here mirror the inline-override fields on the in-document ColorScheme type (in opf.schema.json), so library entries and inline OPF overrides are interchangeable.

$schema.description: Identifies this record as a color scheme in the openpresentation.org catalog.

id.description: Stable slug used by OPF documents to reference this color scheme. Lowercase kebab-case.

name.description: Human-readable scheme name shown in pickers.

summary.description: One-sentence positioning of the palette — what mood it evokes and where to use it.
examples: Cool blue-green palette tuned for B2B SaaS and finance decks.
High-energy warm palette built around burnt-orange accents.

description.description: Longer prose describing the palette and its intended use.
examples: A balanced cool-toned scheme: a deep navy dark slot pairs with mid-saturation blues and a teal accent for charts and callouts. Works well on both light and dark backgrounds.

accent1.description: Accent 1 color (hex). Mirrors the OOXML accent1 slot.

accent2.description: Accent 2 color (hex). Mirrors the OOXML accent2 slot.

accent3.description: Accent 3 color (hex). Mirrors the OOXML accent3 slot.

accent4.description: Accent 4 color (hex). Mirrors the OOXML accent4 slot.

accent5.description: Accent 5 color (hex). Mirrors the OOXML accent5 slot.

accent6.description: Accent 6 color (hex). Mirrors the OOXML accent6 slot.

dark1.description: Dark 1 color (hex). Typically the deepest neutral; OOXML dark1.

dark2.description: Dark 2 color (hex). Secondary dark; OOXML dark2.

light1.description: Light 1 color (hex). Typically the slide canvas; OOXML lt1.

light2.description: Light 2 color (hex). Secondary light surface; OOXML lt2.

tags.description: Free-form labels for filtering and search.

preview.description: Visual previews of the record, used by picker UIs and inline rendering. All sub-fields are optional; engines fall back gracefully when previews aren't available.

src.description: Main preview image (PNG/JPG). Used as the primary visual in picker UIs and previews of the record.

thumbnailSrc.description: Smaller thumbnail preview suited to dense grid views.

vectorSrc.description: SVG / vector preview for crisp scaling at any size.
